arts.ttl: Aston Villa enter race for unsettled Juventus forward
arts.sum: Aston Villa have joined Arsenal, Chelsea and Manchester United in expressing interest in Juventus forward Dusan Vlahovic. The Serbia international is being heavily linked with an exit from Juventus in the summer. Vlahovic’s current contract expires in 2026 and Juventus are not prepared to let the player enter the final 12 months of his deal.
